allowed_claims.basis: Stage 3B-9 readiness passed, Stage 3B-10 wrote the summary, and Stage 3B-11 robustness passed.
allowed_claims.claim: A caveated posterior summary exists for the DEU full-objective working-lock production sampler.
allowed_claims.required_caveat: This is not a final publication claim and not a model-superiority claim.

allowed_claims.basis: Stage 3B-6/3B-7/3B-9 production lineage and Stage 3B-12 external framing preflight.
allowed_claims.claim: The production posterior used the full-objective likelihood set and the guarded working-lock configuration.
allowed_claims.required_caveat: The statement is scoped to the production YAML and chain family only.

allowed_claims.claim: The readiness and robustness gates passed on two production chain files and 4000 combined rows.
allowed_claims.required_caveat: This does not by itself establish external model comparison or publication-grade superiority.

allowed_claims.basis: Tri-anchor monitoring passed in Stage 3B readiness and robustness artifacts.
allowed_claims.claim: The tri-anchor context is retained as a monitoring caveat around the full-objective posterior.
allowed_claims.required_caveat: Do not erase the high-l/lowl/full-objective split from the narrative.

allowed_claims.basis: Stage 3B-12 TT_lite status and Stage 3B-11 TT_lite diagnostic.
allowed_claims.claim: TT_lite may be described as diagnostic-only monitoring context, not part of the sampled posterior likelihood.
allowed_claims.required_caveat: Do not claim the production posterior includes TT_lite.

allowed_claims.basis: Stage 3B-10 parameter summary reproduced by robustness checks.
allowed_claims.required_caveat: Report as chain-summary posterior under the production sampler, not as final external cosmological truth.

allowed_claims.required_caveat: Report as chain-summary posterior under the production sampler, not as final external cosmological truth.

blocked_claims.claim: DEU is superior to ΛCDM or the native baseline.
blocked_claims.reason: No explicit baseline/native model-comparison evidence stage has been booked.
blocked_claims.unblock_condition: Run and book an explicit model-comparison extension with matched likelihood scope and clear criteria.

blocked_claims.reason: TT_lite was diagnostic-only and excluded from the production sampler likelihood.
blocked_claims.unblock_condition: Run a separate production sampler including TT_lite or state TT_lite only as diagnostic context.

blocked_claims.claim: Final publication-style claim or external robustness claim.
blocked_claims.reason: Stage 3B-12 explicitly kept final publication claims blocked.
blocked_claims.unblock_condition: Book a final claim-lock after external/model-comparison and robustness scope is complete.

blocked_claims.claim: All Planck likelihood components prefer the same DEU anchor.
blocked_claims.reason: The tri-anchor split is retained and must remain visible.
blocked_claims.unblock_condition: Run additional diagnostics demonstrating consensus across the relevant objectives.

blocked_claims.claim: The MAP-like chain row is an optimizer result or independent best fit.
blocked_claims.reason: Stage 3B-10 records it as a chain diagnostic only.
blocked_claims.unblock_condition: Run a separate optimizer/best-fit stage if that claim is needed.

claim_lock_manifest.recommendation: Book Stage 3B-13. Use only the allowed scoped/caveated posterior claims. Next run an explicit baseline/native model-comparison extension before model-superiority or publication-style claims.

parameter_claim_summary.claim_caveat: Use as Stage 3B production posterior summary only; not final external model-comparison evidence.

required_extensions.name: Explicit native/baseline model-comparison extension
required_extensions.purpose: Compare DEU scoped posterior/fit context against native/baseline under matched likelihood scope.

required_extensions.name: Final publication-claim lock
required_extensions.next_stage_hint: Stage 3B-15 final claim lock after model-comparison extension
required_extensions.purpose: Review all caveats, TT_lite scope, tri-anchor context, and model-comparison evidence before external claims.

required_extensions.name: TT_lite-inclusive sensitivity sampler or fixed diagnostic
required_extensions.next_stage_hint: TT_lite sensitivity branch, not a replacement for the current full-objective posterior.
required_extensions.purpose: Clarify whether diagnostic TT_lite behavior changes the production posterior story.

required_extensions.name: Best-fit optimizer check at/near posterior summary
required_extensions.next_stage_hint: Separate best-fit check if manuscript-style best-fit numbers are needed.
required_extensions.purpose: Avoid overinterpreting chain MAP-like rows as optimizer outputs.
